svg.text: PART A · Produce the typed IR
— A Five-Stage Framework for Structured Review-to-Issue Translation
Raw app reviews → typed, developer-routable issue specifications → aligned, compliant developer responses
Closed-loop feedback : Stage 5 corrections retrain Stage 1 & refine Stage 3 prompts
Typed intermediate passed between stages (information-extraction cascade)
Human-in-the-loop checkpoint at high-uncertainty junctures (selective prediction)
Feedback loop: corrections propagate backward to retrain upstream stages
Green chips = headline result per stage, traceable to a paper table.
Released artifacts: V1-V5 classifiers, 5,230 verified anchor, 490 gold,
SpecCov scorer, 100-cluster benchmark, CMDP-RLHF testbed, 4-LLM replication.
